name: voxel-platformer
description: Voxel platformer foundation — level rendering, character movement + jumps, swept-AABB physics, bow shooting. Distilled from voxel-rpg-engine without NPCs / AI / inventory / HUD.

scripts.build:game: npm run levels:procedural && tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode game
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && cp tests/package.cjs.json .tmp/test-build/package.json && node .tmp/test-build/scripts/export-procedural-levels.js && node --test .tmp/test-build/tests/*.test.js
